allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const raw = process.env.USERS_CREDENTIALS; console.log\(''Length:'', raw?.length\); try { const p = JSON.parse\(raw\); console.log\(''Count:'', p.length\); console.log\(''First:'', p[0].username, p[0].firstName, p[0].department\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''Error:'', e.message\); console.log\(''First 200:'', raw?.substring\(0,200\)\); }")
